name: Jay CJA
vision: Landing page for our SAV token community offer. 25 spots for SAV holders to get a custom WordPress site built for 1,995 USD in SAV. Need: hero with urgency badge, 6-feature package grid, pricing card (1995 USD in SAV), 4-step how-it-works timeline, 8-field application form with success state, footer with services and company links. Dark navy + amber gold. Crypto-adjacent luxury feel like lovable.dev.

data.title: Hero — Paid in SAV
data.notes: Headline with urgency badge (25 spots), amber gradient text, dual CTAs, 3 stat chips

data.title: Package Features Grid
data.notes: 6 deliverables: Custom Design, Performance, SSL+Security, Mobile First, Content Setup, Launch Ready

data.title: Pricing — 1995 SAV
data.notes: Glowing card: 1,995 USD in SAV, token locked at current rate, no USD accepted

data.title: How It Works
data.notes: 4-step timeline: share assets, draft structure, design+build, approve+launch

data.title: Application Form
data.notes: 8 fields: name, business, SAV wallet, telegram, discord, site type, 3 inspirations, #1 goal

data.title: Footer
data.notes: Services + Company columns, copyright 2026 CJA Web Services LLC Lehi Utah, info@cjawebservices.com
